@9Bathsheba achonsetpi nunga Nathan themgaopan ahung pho jouva David’in la lamkaipa henga Kisihna la khat anabol@7
@9Edom mi Doeg kitipa Saul henga ahunga “David chu Ahimelech in a ahungtai” tia asei nunga David’in kihilna dinga la lamkaipa henga la khat abol.@7
@9La lamkaipa henga dammo veiset pet’a kihilna dinga David labol@7
@9Ziph mite Saul henga acheuva, “David chu keiho lah a akisel’e” tia aseipet’uva David’in tumgingthei toh thoa kihilna sah dia la lamkaipa henga la anabol@7

Mibol gentheitea kona huhdohna dia taona @9(Ps. 108:1-5)@7
@9Saul koma kona ajamdoh a songkoa achen laiya la lamkaipa henga ‘sumang hih-in’ kiti lakaiya sah did David’in taona la anabol.@7
@9La lamkaipa henga ‘Sumang hih-in,’ ti lakaiya sah dia David taona lahol.@7
@9Saul’in David atha theina dinga mi asol’a, a-ina a-nga sah laiya la lamkaipa henga ‘sumang hih-in’ ti lakaiya sah dia David’in taona la anabol.@7
Galte toh kidoupet’a Panpi ngeh a taona. @9(Ps. 108: 6-13)@7

@9La lamkaipa henga okai lhingset a sah dia kihilna nei dinga David’in taola abol. Aram-naharaim le Aram-zobah toh akisat jou, Joab inlama ahung kile kit nunga chikhuh phaiya Edom mite sang som le sang ni athagam nunga abol ahi@7

chapters.text: @@@1Migiloute thumop banga chon louva, @2Michonsete lamlhah a jong dingle @3lou, @1Mi jontai nomho jong toukhompi lou @3michu @2Mi nun nom ahi.
@@@1Hitobang mi hin Pakai danthu jenga @3bou kipana aneiyin, @2Pakai danthu chu sun le janin agel @3geljie.

@@@1Amahi luipanga thingphung kiphut @3tobang ahin, @2Aphat phat cha hung gaji thingphung @3tobang ahi; @1Hitobang thingphung hi ado jong agopji @3pon, @2Hitobang mi jong chu atohlam lama @3akhangtouve.
@@@1Migiloute vang chutobang ahipoi; @2Huilah a changvai kithea alhoh @3mangsoh bep ahiuvin ahi;
@@@1Hijeh a chu migiloute vang thutanna dingjou @3lou diu, @2Midih ho kikhopna jong chonsete lhathei @3lou diu ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin midih ho lamlhah @3ahetpeh nan, @2Migiloute lampi vang manthahna lut ding @3ahibouve.
@@@1Ipi dia namtin vaipi lah a kitomona lenga, @2Pannabeiya idia mitin vaipi kidou hiu vam?
@@@1Leiset lengte atoukhom’uvin, @2Vaihom thuneite jong kihoutoh din @3akikhom’uve, @1Pakai le Pakai thaonupa @2Dou nan akihousom’uvin hitin @3aseiyui;
@@@1“Eikan nau thih khaoho hi tumtan jengu @3hitin, @2Pohgih hahsa eipohsah-u jong hi sep @3lhau hite,“atiuve.
@@@1Alaltouna vana toupan anuisat’in, @2Pakaiyin amaho chu nuijat nan aneitai.
@@@1Pakaiyin ajah uva lungsan thu aseiyin @2Lung hang tah-in ahoh kicha gamin hitin @3aseiye,
@@@1“Keiman kalhendoh lengpa chu @2Kei dia lhang theng Ziona kapansah-e,” @3ati.
@@@1Pakai thugahna chu keiman phongdoh @3inge: @2Aman kajah a, “Nang hi kachapa nahin, @1Keiman tuni nikhoa @2Kahin nahi.
@@@1Kahenga thumin namtin vaipi hi @3gouva kalosah ding nahin; @2Van mong geiya leiset pumpi nalo @3ding ahi.
@@@1Nangman namtin vaipi hi thihjol’a @3najep cheh a, @2Beldengpa bel kivochip banga navoh @3chip ding ahi,” ati.
@@@1Hijeh chun tuhin ching theiyun vo @3leng ho, @2Vo leiset vaihomte kiging phauvin.
@@@1Pakai kin bol’uvin ama jeng ginguvin, @2Kihot hot’in

@@@1akengphang teni chop-peh-uvin; @2Achutilou leh Pakai lung hangin tin, @1Nang hon manthahna nanei diu ahi; @2Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai lunghan hi @1Hetman louhel’a hung deujah jengji @3ahi. @1Pakai henga kisel jing jengte chu @2Anun nom ahiuve.
@@@1O Pakai, eidou ding mi atam cheh @3cheh jenge! @2Keima dou din mihem tamtah @3aki-pantauve.
@@@1Mi tamtah-in kachung chang thu @3aseiyun, @2“A-Pathenpa koma jong ama dia kithopina @3ding aumpoi,” atiuve. @9Selah@7
@@@1Hijongleh vo Pakai nang hi kadinga @3luma kisung nahin, @2Kaloupina nahi, nangin khodah @3ngama neikoi jing ahi.
@@@1Keima Pakai henga othong leuvin @3ka-taovin, @2Hijeh chun aman jong alhang thenga @3konin eihin houve: @9Selah@7
@@@1Keima kalumin ka-ihmu jin, @2Pakaiyin eihoidama eivah jeh-in ka @3hung thou kit’e.
@@@1Mihem sang som sang ja kakimvel’a @3hung kigol’u hen @2Keima dou din hung jeng jonguleh @3kaging tapoi.
@@@1O Pakai hung thouvin, @2Vo ka-Pathen, neihuhdoh loiyin! @1Ajeh chu nangin kamelma hijatpi hi @2Akhalhang guu naveichip peh soh jin; @1Migiloute hahem tah jong chu @2Nangman ahau navo pul soh jie.
@@@1Mihuhdohna hi Pakaiya ahi; @2Namite chunga naphatthei boh hung @3lhung hen! @9Selah@7
@@@1Kadihna dia eipanhu vo Pathen, @2Kahin koutengleh neihouvin! @1Genthei kathoh tengleh @2Nangman neikhoto jin ahi. @1Keima neilungset’in lang @2Kataona ngaiyin.
@@@1Vo mihem chate, ichan geiya neijum @3souva, @2Itih chan geiya pannabei thu kiseiho @3na-ngailut’uva @1jou le nal nahol le diu ham? @9Selah@7
@@@1Hethem’uvin Pathen hethemte chu @2Pathenin ama din abungin akhendoh @3tai; @1Keiman kakou tengleh @2Pakaiyin angai teiye.
@@@1Lung hanguvin lang, chonset bol @3dauvin, @2Janteng nalupnaa nalungthimin kihou @3houvun @1Thip beh chan um’uvin. @9Selah@7
@@@1Lungdih pun kilhaina jeng bol’uvin @3lang, @1Pakai jenga lung ngaiyun.
@@@1Mi tampin aseiyuvin, @2“O kadeh, keihon jong thilpha pha-bep @3beh kamu diu ahi! @1Vo Pakai, keiho chunga hin @2Namaivah hinsal vah temin,” @3atiuve.
@@@1Pakai nangman kalungthima kipana @3nasa tah neipen, @2Mihon chang tampi aneiyuva lengpitwi @2neng jeng junga aneipet’uva akipa @3sangun kakipah joi.
@@@1Keima lung monga kalup’a ka-ihmut @3ding ahi; @2Ajeh chu Pakai nangbou lung monga @3eichensah nahi.
@@@1O Pakai kathuseiho nanan neingaipeh-in @3lang, @2Kathoh gimna gelkhoh tei teiyin.
@@@1Ka ka-gin hin ngaiyin @2Kalengpa leh ka-Pathen; @1Ajeh chu nangma henga Hung taova @3kap kahi.
@@@1Vo Pakai, jingkah le nangin katao @3gin na-ngaijin. @1Jingkah teng kenjong nakoma kilhaina @2ding gonsan kakoijin ka-ngah @2jinge.
@@@1Ajeh chu nang hi thilsea kipahji @3Pathen nahipon, @2Thilse chu nang to kilhon thei @3louhel ahibouve.
@@@1Namit mua jong mi kiletsah pang @3jou lou ding; @2Nangin thilse bolte aboncha nahot @3ahiye.
@@@1Nangman jou seite nasumang jin, @2Thisan sohatte jousei nomte chu @3Pakaiyin akidah-e.
@@@1Keivang nalungset natsat behseh @3jeh hin @2Nangma houin sunga hung lut tei @3nange; @1Nangma gin le janan kenvang @2Nahouin theng maiya boh khup’ing @3ting chibai kaboh ding nahi.
@@@1O Pakai, kemelmate jeh hin @2Nalamdih-a neipuiyin; @1Kei dingin kamasanga @2Nalampi hin lhung jang keiyin.
@@@1Ajeh chu miho kamsunga thudih @3apot tapon, @2Alungthimu jong suhmangna ding @3jeng ahi; @1Alolbuh-u jong lhankot kihong @3ahi-jengin, @2Lei nal hiu heuvin thu aseiyuve.
@@@1Vo Pathen, amaho hi amo nau kipoh @3sah-in lang, @1Athilgonu chu akipal lhuh nau hisah @3jon! @2Thil hijat suh khel aneijeh-uvin paidoh @3jengin, @1Ajeh chu nangma doumah mah @3jeng abol’uve.
@@@1Amavang nang lima kisel miho vang @3abonchan @2Kipa la sah-sah sah jengin lang; @1Nang vanga choisanga aum theina @3diuvin @2Namin ngailu jouse panpin, huh @3jingin.
@@@1Vo Pakai, midih phatthei bohji @3chu nang nahin, @2Nalungset chun midih chu lumin @3akhu bangin akhui.
@@@1O Pakai, lung phamo jongle chun @3talen neimatsah dan, @2Lungna lheh jongle chun nei-engbol @3hih-in.
@@@1Vo Pakai, neikhoton athabei @3pai ding kahitai; @2O Pakai, neidamsah-in, kagu kachang @3jousen eichip’e.
@@@1Kalhagao agenthei behseh jeng @3tai. @2O Pakai itih chan geiya hitia @3boldia neigot ham?
@@@1Vo Pakai, hung kile kit’ in lang @3hahinkho huhhingin, @2Neilungset jeh chun neihuhdoh @3tei teiyin;
@@@1Ajeh chu kithi leh nangma geldohna @3jong umpon tin, @2Noimigama chu kon nangma navahchoi @3ding ham?
@@@1Kagenthei thoh thoh nan abeipai @3ding kahitan, @2Jansim janseh leh kalhi along @3long jengin, @1Ka-kap kap jeng jin, @2Kajalkhun jeng jong kalhi akotsoh @3tai.
@@@1Kamit lhi lon lon nan kamit la @3achopai ding ahitan, @2Kamelma atam behseh phat’in kamit @3akham jen june.
@@@1Thilse bol mite, nabonchauvin @3kakoma konin potdoh jengun! @2Ajeh chu Pakaiyin keima ka-ogin @3ajatai.
@@@1Pakaiyin kathil thum chu einop @3peh tan, @2Kataona Pakaiyin asang tai.
@@@1Kamelmate abonchauva kijumsouva, @2Hatah-a hung genthei ding ahiuve; @1Hetman louhel’a hung kile heiyuva @2Mit phet kah louva jachat akimu @3diu ahitai.
@@@1Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, keima nanga @3kisel kahi; @2Eihin nungdel mitea konin neihuhhingin @3neihuhdoh-in;
@@@1Achutilouva ahileh amahon @2Sakei bahkaiyin mi akaimang @3banga eikai diu, @1Eichudoh ding beihel’a @2Eilhoh mang jeng diu ahi.
@@@1Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, keiman hitobang @3thilsekabol’a, @2Kakhut tenia hi thildih lou auma @3ahileh,
@@@1Kagol kapai jong thilpha aboljeh @3a thilse kabolpeh auma, @2Ajeh beiya kamelmate kachoma @3ahileh;
@@@1Melmapan eihindel del jeng hen, @3eiman hen, @2Tol’a eichil thang jeng hen; @1Kahinna katahsa jeng jong hi @2Leivui lah a chilthang den @3hen. @9Selah@7
@@@1Vo Pakai, lung hang pumin hung kondoh @3jengin, @2Kamelmate kitum let lut ho hitoh @3kidinten; @1Vo ka-Pathen hung thouvin, @2Nangman thu tanding nakoisa ahime.
@@@1Mitin vaipi nakimvela @2Kihon lel lulin hung kikhom @3jongu leh, @1Achunga nalaltouna @2Sangtah-in kidon touphan.
@@@1Pakaiyin mitin vaipi thu atanjin, @2O Pakai keijong kalungdet jeh @3leh @1Kadihna bangin, @2Kachunga thu tan jengin.
@@@1Migiloute gitlouna subei hel’in @3lang, @2Midih vang pandet sah jingin; @1Nangin mihem lungthim le alunggil @3nakhol jin, @1Hijeh chun @2Nangma Pathen dihtah nahi.
@@@1Kakiselna lum Pathen koma @3aumin, @2Milungdih chu Pathenin ahuhhinge.
@@@1Pathen chu dihtah a thutan ahin, @2Hijeh chun niseh a lung uljing @3Pathen ahiye.
@@@1Mihem khattouvin lung aheilouva ahileh @2Pathenin achemjam akinol hem @3ding ahi; @1Chujongleh athalpi akamsal’a @2Akap jengji ahi.
@@@1Pathenin thina thei thai-an @3akibeh-in, @2Athal chang ho jong meisi leng @3pahlah lah abange.
@@@1Ven, migilouvin thilse jeng naovop’in @3avop jin, @1Joule nal jeng a-oisunga @2Naokon akikoi jin @1Thujou jeng asunga konin naopenin @3apengdoh jeng junge.
@@@1Migilouvin kokhuh tong dengin @3alaiyin, @2Avang laiya chun amajoh alhalut @3jin ahi.
@@@1Thilse agon jouse ama chunga @3alechuh jin @2Thagol khatah a mi adenna achunga @3achuh loi.
@@@1Kenvang adihjal’a thangvah lom @2Pakai thangvah ing ting, @1Chungnungpen Pakai min vahchoi @2la kasah ding ahi.
@@@1O Yahweh ka-Pakaiyu, @2Leiset pumpia itobanga minthang @3nahi hitam!

@@@1Nalal loupina hi van mun jousea @3jong lan akisan, @2Naosen ho le chapang hon jong @3akambem bemin asauve. @1Namelmate douna dingin nangman @3kulpi nakaiyin, @2Melmate leh phulah nomte suhnem @3din nagel e.
@@@1Keiman nakhutsoh nasemsa van @3mun jouse kavet’a, @2Nangin nagoldohsa lha le ahsi @3jouse kavet leh;
@@@1Mihem hi ipi hiya nangin hibanga @3nagel khoh a, @2Mihem chapa hi ipi ham hibanga @3nakhohsah?
@@@1Nangin ama hi Pathen sanga themcha @3neojon nakoiyin, @2Loupina lal lukhuh nakhuhpeh-in @3jana napei.
@@@1Nakhutsoh thil jouse chunga lengvaipoa @3thu neina napen, @2Thil ijakai abonchan @1Ama kengto te ni noiya nakoisoh tai.
@@@1Kelngoi jouse le bongchal jouse @3jong, @2Gamjang a gamsa jouse jong ahiuvin;
@@@1Chunga leng vachate leh @2Twikhanglena nga namkim ahiuvin; @1Ipi hijongleh Twikhanglen lam jon’a @3kitol jouse jong ahiuve.
@@@1O Yahweh ka-Pakaiyu, @2Leiset pumpia itobanga minthang @3nahi hitam!
@@@1Keiman kalungthim pumpin Pakai @3thangvah-ing ting, @2Pakai nathilbol kidang tah tah @3hi abanchan seiyinge.
@@@1Nachunga kipah-ing ting, @2Nangjenga kichoi-an inge; @1Vo Chungnungpen Pakai, @2Namin vahchoi la sange.
@@@1Kamelmate anung jam teng jongleh @2Na-angsunga akisep lhu’uvin amangthah @3jiuve.
@@@1Ajeh chu nangin ka themna naching @3jingin, @2Laltounaa natouvin adih dih-in @3thu natanjie.
@@@1Nangin namtin vaipi naphoh jin @2Migilou vang nasumang ji tai; @1Amin jengu jong tonsot tonsot @3geiya din @1Nanoi mangsohjin ahi.
@@@1Melma chu thou kit louhel dingin @3athigam tauvin, @2Akhopi jouseu jong nangin abul abal’a @3nakaldoh ahitai; @1Amaho melchih theina jouse @3jong, @2Akihepha tahih hel jenge.
@@@1Ahin Pakai vang tonsot laltouna @3atou jingin, @2Amatah-in thutanna din laltouna @3akidotai.
